mapper.select: SELECT * FROM LOAN_PRODUCT ORDER BY updated_at DESC, add_date DESC, product_id DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT LOAN_PRODUCT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO LOAN_PRODUCT ( product_id, provider_id, product_name, product_type_code_value_id, loan_type_code_value_id, repayment_type_code_value_id, collateral_type_code_value_id, rate_type_code_value_id, note, fin_prdt_cd, fin_co_no, company_name, join_way, cb_name, add_date, end_date, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{providerId}, #{productName}, #{productTypeCodeValueId}, #{loanTypeCodeValueId}, #{repaymentTypeCodeValueId}, #{collateralTypeCodeValueId}, #{rateTypeCodeValueId}, #{note}, #{finPrdtCd}, #{finCoNo}, #{companyName}, #{joinWay}, #{cbName}, #{addDate}, #{endDate}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE LOAN_PRODUCT SET provider_id = #{providerId}, product_name = #{productName}, product_type_code_value_id = #{productTypeCodeValueId}, loan_type_code_value_id = #{loanTypeCodeValueId}, repayment_type_code_value_id = #{repaymentTypeCodeValueId}, collateral_type_code_value_id = #{collateralTypeCodeValueId}, rate_type_code_value_id = #{rateTypeCodeValueId}, note = #{note}, fin_prdt_cd = #{finPrdtCd}, fin_co_no = #{finCoNo}, company_name = #{companyName}, join_way = #{joinWay}, cb_name = #{cbName}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
